the epilogue
Every run ends with its proof.
signature-demo.nika.yaml 922 tok · $0.00
$ nika run signature-demo.nika.yaml 🦋 nika · release-notes-i18n · 9 tasks permits ✓ engine floor (no boundary declared) ✔ discover invoke · nika:glob [ 3ms] → [5] · 101B ✔ digest exec · cat [ 9ms] → "- feat: nika test — g…" · 324B ∥ ✔ stats invoke · nika:jq [ 8ms] → {files} · 11B ∥ ✔ draft infer · mock/echo [ 0ms] → "mock(echo) · Draft co…" · 389B · 64 tok ✔ translate for_each · 4 items [ 0ms] → [4] · 1.8KB · 288 tok ✔ survivors invoke · nika:jq [ 1ms] → [4] · 1.8KB ✔ verify agent · 1 turns [ 0ms] → "mock(echo) · Review t…" · 2.0KB · 556 tok ✔ publish exec · printf [33ms] → "published: release no…" · 32B ✔ report infer · mock/echo [ 0ms] → "mock(echo) · One-line…" · 107B · 14 tok ── 9/9 done · $0.00 · elapsed 0.1s ───────────────────────────── discover ▕██▏ 3ms digest ▕ ██████▏ 9ms stats ▕ █████▏ 8ms draft ▕ █▏ 0ms translate ▕ █▏ 0ms survivors ▕ █▏ 1ms verify ▕ █▏ 0ms publish ▕ ██████████████████████▏ 33ms report ▕ █▏ 0ms 0s ······································· 52ms ╭─ nika ✓ release-notes-i18n ──────────────────────────────╮ │ ◆ ⇉ ◆◆ ⇉ ◆ ⇉ ◆ ⇉ ◆ ⇉ ◆ ⇉ … 9 tasks · 8 waves · 0 r… │ │ 54ms · 922 tok · $0.00 · mock/echo · 1 turns │ │ outputs → notes (string) │ ╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯ explore: nika run signature-demo.nika.yaml --json > run.ndjson · nika trace outputs run.ndjson
nika 0.93.1 · real cli output · mock model · offline · 100-col pty nika.sh 🦋
